LAW AND MOTION, THE MATTER OF WHETHER SERVICE WAS EFFECTED ON MS. BRADLEY IS DISCUSSED BY THE COURT AND THE PARTIES. THE COURT GRANTS MS. BRADLEY'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE OF TODAY'S HEARING. THE HEARING ON PLAINTIFF PAMELA CARRARA'S MOTION TO ADD ALTER EGO DEFENDANT TO JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 13, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION. ANY OPPOSITION BY MS. BRADLEY IS TO BE FILED BY 1/29/19. ANY REPLY BRIEF BY PLAINTIFF IS TO BE FILED BY 2/6/19. THE COURT ORDERS MS. BRADLEY TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITH HER P.O. BOX ADDRESS, TELEPHONE NUMBER(S), AND E-MAIL CONTACT INFORMATION TODAY. THE COURT ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY EFFECT SERVICE ON MS. BRADLEY VIA E-MAIL. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Add Alter Ego Defendant To Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 187
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Add Alter Ego Defendant To Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 187
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Continued To Mar-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PAMELA CARRARA Plaintiff'S Motion To Add Alter Ego Defendant To Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 187

Continued to March 20, 2019 at 9:30 AM per agreement of the parties (email 1/29/19).

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Add Alter Ego Defendant To Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 187
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Continued To Feb-13-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. WILLIAM F. ALDERMAN, ESQ. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (Tel: 415-773-5944) appearing for plaintiff Pamela Carrara;
SUSAN BRADLEY (Tel: 831-238-6111) appearing in pro per.

The matter of whether service was effected on Ms. Bradley is discussed by the Court and the parties. The Court grants Ms. Bradley's request for a continuance of today's hearing. The hearing on plaintiff Pamela Carrara's Motion to Add Alter Ego Defendant to Judgment is continued to February 13, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Any opposition by Ms. Bradley is to be filed by 1/29/19. Any reply brief by plaintiff is to be filed by 2/6/19. The Court orders Ms. Bradley to provide plaintiff's counsel with her P.O. Box address, telephone number(s), and e-mail contact information today. The Court orders that plaintiff may effect service on Ms. Bradley via e-mail.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/HK)
